programmes.show_description: An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Taut thriller starring Josie Davis. After her stepdaughter witnesses a murder, Cindy tries to protect her. But as the truth unravels, is the greatest danger living under her own roof (2017)?
Courtroom thriller starring Francine Locke. When her son is accused of murder, Jackie fights against the odds to clear his name. A story of justice, tragedy and faith based on true events (2013).

Political Agenda: Sue tries to prove that a man with mental health issues is innocent of the murder of an investigative reporter.

Family Doctor: Jessica and Dr Hazlitt find themselves in grave danger when they are kidnapped by a prominent Boston crime family.
Suspicion Of Murder: Can Dennis Stanton prove his innocence after he is accused of killing his girlfriend's estranged husband?
Moving Violation: Sheriff Metzger finds himself under mounting political pressure after arresting the son of a U.S Ambassador. Will Jessica's investigation clear the Sheriff of murder?
Who Killed J.B. Fletcher?: Jessica finds herself involved in a surreal investigation when members of a small Texan town die in suspicious circumstances.
...Free Man: Jessica travels to the Deep South to investigate the brutal killing of a slave in the 1860's. Can she unearth the truth and ultimately prove the man's innocence? (2001)

programmes.show_name: Murder, She Baked: A Deadly Recipe
programmes.show_description: Whodunnit with Alison Sweeney. Expert baker and amateur sleuth Hannah Swensen has a puzzling new mystery to sink her teeth into when she finds an expired Sheriff on the streets of Eden Lake... (2016)
Let's Get It Ahn: A counterfeiter witness is implicated in a murder. Mary and Marshall become suspicious of the clues, which seem fake, and wonder if there's a deeper conspiracy at hand.
And Justice For All: Castle goes undercover in a Language School to investigate the murder of a student. He soon learns that language isn't the only barrier to solving this mysterious case.
Poisoned In Paradise: When a waitress is poisoned after seeking his help, can ex-cop Jeff Jackson unravel what she had been trying to warn him about? (2021)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Poisoned In Paradise: When a waitress is poisoned after seeking his help, can ex-cop Jeff Jackson unravel what she had been trying to warn him about? (2021)
Blood Will Out: A patient causes havoc at Community General after he seemingly comes back to life. Dr Sloan is suspicious when the National Security Agency shows an interest in the case.
Alienated: Dr Sloan and Steve investigate Jesse's claim that he may have been abducted by aliens during a lakeside holiday. Can the team unearth the truth behind Jesse's disappearance?
The Taxman Cometh: Jessica arrives in Missouri at a fitting time to help her old friend Edna Hayes fight accusations of tax evasion and murder.
From The Horses Mouth: Jessica visits Kentucky where she is reintroduced to the cut-throat world of horse racing. Can Jessica and Harry McGraw discover who killed a successful stable owner?
The Lawyer: The FBI's investigation into a terrorist cell sees Jack and the bureau being accused of racial profiling. Meanwhile, Sue and Lucy try their hand at matchmaking.
The G.D.S.: Castle returns to L.A. in search of answers. But when he's asked to help the prestigious Greatest Detective Society with a case, things take a turn.
Flesh And Blood: Carrie is forced to trust an elusive assassin who claims to have vital information surrounding a potential terrorist attack on New York City.
Once a Ponzi Time: A Wall Street investor hides out in WITSEC after revealing his boss's fraud. To gain protection, he gives up his fortune.
...Malice: No one digs a mystery like archaeologist Emma Fielding - so when a colleague is murdered in a crypt, she soon unearths a long list of suspects... (2018)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
